raw_response: The ASUS ZenBook 14 is an excellent choice for software development within your budget. It offers a powerful Intel Core Ultra 5 processor and 16GB of RAM, suitable for running multiple applications smoothly. The OLED display provides vibrant visuals, enhancing coding experiences. Though the speakers are weak and there's no upgrade path for RAM, its lightweight design and long battery life make it portable and convenient for daily use.
